channel.title: Pages on JensRantil
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on JensRantil

item.description: About Jens Jens Rantil is a developer and sysadmin. He has a MS in Engineering Mathematics from Lund Institute of Technology (LTH), Sweden. His current employer is Tink, a startup that helps you with your personal finances1. Jens can found in various corners of the web: Github Twitter: @JensRantil LinkedIn Facebook Skype: skypeztyx Google chat/e-mail: jens.rantil@gmail.com …although this blog is obviously not affiliated with Tink in any way.
